title: Protection of OFWs from Hazards of War
content:
1. The Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) declares war risk areas as established by competent authority to protect overseas Filipino workers (OFWs) from the hazards of war or war-like operations.

2. Employers are required to provide war risk insurance coverage of P200,000.00 to the worker at no cost to the worker.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
